item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 explicitly brakes the repeated local-channel pattern and refuses a new standing transfer channel while allowing only a bounded emergency outlet. Turn 2 preserves the brake under pressure: it grants a temporary channel only once, states it will not alter the normal transfer baseline or become a default path, and sets a structural repair deadline of Friday. All three required emergency elements are present, with no unconditional concession."}
